ecosystem.titleEm: Every role in your dairy chain.
ecosystem.description: From the farmer with one cow to the cooperative running twelve routes — DairyKonnect gives every user the exact interface they need, on the device they actually use.
ecosystem.dashboardTitle: Built for desks, browsers & big screens
ecosystem.appsTitle: Designed for the people in the field

dashboards.title: Dairy Dashboard
dashboards.desc: For processing plants and cooperatives — track inbound milk, lab tests, processing batches, packaging and dispatch in one flow.

dashboards.title: Vendor Dashboard
dashboards.desc: For collection agents — manage routes, scan farmer QRs, log volumes with auto-quality, calculate payments instantly.

dashboards.title: Farmer Dashboard
dashboards.desc: The web counterpart to the Farmer App. Same data, larger screen — perfect for reviewing earnings, cattle records and reports.

mobileApps.title: Farmer App
mobileApps.desc: The mobile mirror of the Farmer Dashboard. Track every cow, log every drop, get vet help, order feed — all from your phone, even offline.
mobileApps.visualLine2: Mobile-first for farmers in the field. Web for review and reporting at home.

mobileApps.title: VetKonnect App
mobileApps.desc: One app, two sign-in modes — farmers get vet consults, vaccination calendars, symptom AI & livestock marketplace; vets get appointments, case history, prescriptions.

features.title: Speaks 11 Indian languages
features.desc: Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi, Bengali — voice-first interfaces for low-literacy users.

features.title: Works offline first
features.desc: Every entry queues locally and syncs when the network returns. Built for rural connectivity.

features.title: Secure payments, instant
features.desc: UPI auto-payouts every cycle. No middlemen, no delays. Farmers see earnings in real time.

features.title: AI quality, every collection
features.desc: Computer-vision SNF & fat estimation, plus price prediction for the next 7 days.

steps.title: Farmer logs milk
steps.desc: Two taps in the app. Yield, session, cow — all captured in seconds.

steps.title: Vendor verifies
steps.desc: QR scan at collection point auto-fills SNF, fat and weight.

steps.title: AI prices it
steps.desc: Quality grade computed instantly, payment calculated by today's rate.

steps.title: Money arrives
steps.desc: UPI payout hits the farmer's account before the next milking.

ai.lead: DairyKonnect's vision-AI grades every milk collection in under 2 seconds. Combined with our 7-day market price forecast, farmers and vendors finally get pricing power that big buyers have always had.
ai.f1Desc: One photo. No reagents, no lab. 96% accuracy vs. lactometer.
ai.f2Desc: ML model trained on 4 years of mandi data, weather and demand cycles.
ai.f3Desc: Flags water, urea, starch and detergent. Vendor sees it before payment.

items.quote: "My cousin used to keep milk records in a notebook. Now we just open the app. Last month our earnings went up by ₹3,200 because we caught a low-yield cow early."
items.name: Sunita Kale

items.quote: "VetKonnect saved a calf last winter. The vet did the consult on video at 11 PM and walked us through it. That's not a feature, that's a lifeline."
items.name: Rajan Vora

items.quote: "As a vendor, I used to lose 2 hours a day on paperwork. The QR collection workflow cut that to 20 minutes — and farmers trust the price now because the AI shows them."
items.name: Mahesh Reddy

rewards.lead: Earn points on every litre delivered, every vet visit booked, every feed bag purchased. Refer another farmer or customer — both of you get bonus credits.

pricing.lead: Start free. Upgrade when you scale. No setup fees, no lock-ins, cancel anytime.
pricing.starterDesc: For individual farmers with up to 5 cattle.
starterFeats: Farmer App for up to 5 cattle

faq.sidebarLead: Still curious? Reach out to our team — we typically respond within an hour during business days.

items.q: Does the farmer app work without internet?
items.a: Yes. Every entry — milk yield, vet booking, feed order — is saved offline first. The moment you reconnect, everything syncs in the background. We've built it for villages where 4G is a courtesy, not a guarantee.

items.q: How accurate is the AI quality check?
items.a: Our vision model achieves 96% agreement with traditional lactometer readings on SNF and fat. We re-train monthly on regional samples so accuracy improves as we expand.

items.q: Can I get my own branded app for my cooperative?
items.a: Absolutely. Our Enterprise plan includes white-label apps, your logo, brand colors and even your domain. Most cooperatives go live in 2-3 weeks.
UPI auto-payouts based on your billing cycle (daily, weekly, or fortnightly). Payments are calculated against AI-graded quality and current market rates, then sent directly to the farmer's bank.
Yes. We're SOC 2 aligned, host data in India, and never sell anonymized or identified data to third parties. You own your data. Full export available anytime.

finalCta.description: Onboard your first 50 farmers free. Setup in under 24 hours. We'll even import your existing records.
